# Andrii Shupta

> Andrii Shupta is a full-stack engineer with 10+ years of experience building and modernizing production software across architecture, security, APIs, performance, and AI-assisted development.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://andriishupta.dev/): Profile, experience, technical focus, and contact links.
- [CV](https://andriishupta.dev/Andrii_Shupta_Lead_Full_Stack_CV.pdf): Concise professional experience and skills.
- [Blog](https://blog.andriishupta.dev/): Technical writing by Andrii Shupta.

## Technology stack
- Node.js: Hono.js, NestJS and more
- React.js: Next.js, TanStack and more
- PostgreSQL and Supabase
- AWS, Cloudflare, and more
- AI-first approaches
